nl_query: For each course in the current academic year, show the number of students registered, number of scripts attempted, number absent, number barred, and the pass percentage based on published results with final marks at least 40 percent of the paper total.
failed_sql: SELECT au.code AS course_code, au.name AS course_name, COUNT(DISTINCT sc.id) AS student_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS script_attempted_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'ABSENT' THEN a.id ELSE NULL END) AS absent_count, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN a.lifecycle_status = 'BARRED' THEN a.id ELSE NULL END) AS barred_count, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.final_marks >= 0.4 * qp.total_marks THEN a.id ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT a.id), 0), 2) AS pass_pct FROM academic_unit au JOIN student_cache sc ON au.id = sc.course_id JOIN answer_script a ON a.student_id = sc.id JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON a.exam_id = esc.id JOIN question_paper qp ON qp.id = esc.qp_id LEFT JOIN result r ON r.script_id = a.id WHERE esc.academic_year = (SELECT academic_year FROM exam_schedule_cache ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) GROUP BY au.code, au.name ORDER BY pass_pct ASC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Unknown table or alias 'a' referenced in 'a.id'. Ensure it is declared in the FROM/JOIN clause.
